block_00: And some tips for the holidays
block_03: Hi there! Here is the final news of the year: articles that will keep you from getting bored during the holidays, the results of last week, holiday tournaments, and a little about the success of Larry Williams. Be realistic, achieve the impossible! Thank you for reading us. See you in 2021!
block_06: Movies and Books About Trading for the Holidays
block_07: The holidays are coming—time to take a deep breath after a tiring year and recharge for the new things. We’ve prepared some fun recommendations on how to spend this time with purpose.
block_09: Identifying Seasonal Patterns in Stock Markets
block_10: Did you know that January and December are considered the most profitable months for the stock market? Learn what time of year is best to trade depending on your own trading approach.
block_12: Business and Trading. What’s in Common?
block_13: Many traders think about their trading activity as a business that they run on the side. If you are one of them, check these 7 typical mistakes that can destroy both a promising startup and a trading strategy.
block_15: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_41: In 1987, Larry Williams won the World Cup Championship of Futures Trading from  Robbins Trading Company. He turned $10,000 to over $1,100,000 in a 12-month competition, showing a record return of 11,376%.
